expected.notes: Student reports employment but HAS CPT authorization, so rule must not fire despite satisfying the employment condition.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'no_cpt_on_i20', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.has_employment eq yes
  - answers.has_cpt_authorization eq no
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
